programs.title: Our Educational Programs
programs.description: Our programs are carefully designed to suit all levels with a modern, interactive approach that combines deep understanding and practical application.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Manarat Al-Ezz Academy. All rights reserved.
footer.description: A leading academy in the field of Quranic and educational distance learning. We strive to spread the light of revelation in every home through modern technologies and global educational standards.

about.teamText: Our platform is designed for administrators, teachers, and students who need a polished, responsive interface.

testimonials.title: Parents' Reviews
testimonials.subtitle: Success stories from the Manarat Al-Ezz family

items.name: Khaled Al-Rashid
items.text: The technical quality is very high, we faced no connection issues, and the teachers are very patient and explain with a modern and innovative teaching style.

items.name: Umm Layan
items.text: The system and precise tracking impressed me the most, I can follow my daughter in every session directly through my phone, excellent experience.

items.name: Abu Saif
items.text: I didn't expect my daughter to love Quran lessons this much, the teachers have a wonderful educational style that makes the child love memorization and learning.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I change the plan later?
faq.a1: Yes, absolutely. You can upgrade or change your plan at any time through your dashboard, and fees will be adjusted starting the following month.
faq.q2: What happens if I miss a session?
faq.a2: We offer the possibility of making up one session per month provided that the excuse is made at least 24 hours in advance to schedule an alternative time with the teacher.
faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 15% discount for the second child and 25% for the third child and above when registering in the same plan.

curriculum.titleLine2: Enlighten the Insight and Elevate the Soul

cta.title: Are you ready to start your journey?
cta.desc: Join over 5,000 students enjoying a unique educational experience.

sidebar.title: About the Holy Quran Curriculum
sidebar.desc: An integrated curriculum combining proper recitation, perfect memorization, and understanding the meanings of the verses. We adopt a gradual methodology, considering individual differences with a focus on fundamental Tajweed rules.

u1.title: Principles of Tajweed
u1.desc: Learn the articulation points of letters and their basic attributes for a correct recitation.

u2.title: Juz Amma Recitation & Memorization
u2.desc: Memorizing and contemplating short Surahs in an enjoyable way.

u3.title: Maqamat of Recitation
u3.desc: Improving the voice with Quranic performance and learning basic Maqamat.

u4.title: Stories from the Quran
u4.desc: Extracting lessons and morals from the stories of the Prophets.

sidebar.title: About the Arabic Language Curriculum
sidebar.desc: A curriculum that establishes the four language skills: listening, speaking, reading, and writing using modern methods that connect language to daily life.

u1.title: Grammar Basics
u1.desc: Understanding basic grammatical rules and applying them in speaking and writing.

u2.title: Expression Skills
u2.desc: Developing the student's ability to express their thoughts clearly and smoothly.

u3.title: Literature and Rhetoric
u3.desc: Tasting the aesthetics of the Arabic language through studying literary texts.

u4.title: Free Reading
u4.desc: Encouraging reading and expanding linguistic and cognitive horizons.

sidebar.title: About Islamic Studies Curriculum
sidebar.desc: A program aimed at instilling the correct creed, teaching simplified jurisprudence, and drawing lessons from the Prophet's biography.

u1.title: Islamic Creed
u1.desc: Consolidating the pillars of faith and explaining the concepts of monotheism.

u2.title: Fiqh of Worship
u2.desc: Learning the rules of purification, prayer, and fasting practically and theoretically.

u3.title: Prophet's Biography
u3.desc: Stations from the life of the Prophet ﷺ and extracting lessons from them.

u4.title: Ethics and Manners
u4.desc: Promoting positive behaviors and Islamic manners in daily life.

hero.title2: meets the purity of the soul
hero.subtitle: Manarat Al-Ezz is not just an academy, it is a journey into the depths of knowledge, designed to be a digital haven combining the authenticity of heritage and the modernity of technology.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: Providing excellent Quranic and Arabic education accessible to everyone, everywhere. We believe that knowledge is a shared right and the beauty of our language and religion must reach every heart clearly and easily.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Empowering Muslims around the world to learn their language and religion through modern educational technologies and specialized teachers, while preserving the Islamic role model and character.

f1.title: Empowering Learners
f1.desc: Our goal is not merely rote memorization, but empowering every learner with the tools that help them understand the meanings of the Quran and appreciate its beauty. We aim to enable them to express this great language and spread its message worldwide, and we strive to instill a love of learning and contemplation so that the Quran becomes a guiding light in their daily lives.

f2.title: Modern Technology
f2.desc: We utilize the latest remote education technologies to make lessons interactive and enjoyable, suiting today's technology-thirsty generation.

f3.title: Safe Environment
f3.desc: We provide a safe digital haven for your children, where teachers are selected after rigorous tests ensuring their scientific competence and educational integrity.

f4.title: Academic Excellence
f4.desc: Our academy relies on curricula carefully chosen by senior scholars and educators, ensuring a delicate balance between memorization and understanding, and between rules and practical application, creating a comprehensive educational environment.

values.title: Our Values
values.mainDesc: Manarat Al-Ezz Academy derives its principles from the teachings of our true religion, to be a solid foundation upon which we rely in all the educational and upbringing services we offer.

v1.title: Scientific Integrity
v1.desc: Transmitting knowledge with a continuous chain of transmission and a solid methodology that preserves authenticity.

v2.title: Gentleness and Kindness
v2.desc: Teaching with love and encouragement according to the honorable Prophetic approach.

v3.title: Inclusiveness
v3.desc: Providing content that meets all the needs of the individual in their religion and worldly life.

topHero.title: Contact us for inquiries and registration
topHero.desc: Manarat Al-Ezz team is always with you to support your children educationally and answer all inquiries and complaints regarding courses, registration, and follow-up.

banner.title: Contact us to register and subscribe
banner.desc: Give your children the opportunity to learn and grow through our educational courses designed to develop skills and build confidence in a fun and safe way.

mock.name: Sheikh Ahmed Mansour
mock.title: Certified in the Ten Qira'at
mock.about: Professor of Qira'at and Quranic sciences with over 15 years of experience in academic and private teaching. I hold an Ijaza in the Ten Mutawatir Qira'at, and I strive to simplify Islamic sciences for the younger generation.
mock.philosophy: Teaching is not just transferring information, but instilling values and building a balanced Quranic personality. I believe every student has a unique journey with the Quran, and my role is to light this path.
